footer.description: Curated medium for AI, startups, and technology in Switzerland. Daily insights into the digital transformation.

newsletter.title: SwissTech Intelligence Briefing
newsletter.headline: The Swiss AI Advantage for your inbox.
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter and receive the monthly «AI in Switzerland» Report (PDF) for free directly in your inbox.
newsletter.description_extended: Join 2,000+ experts. Get weekly insights and the monthly «AI in Switzerland» Report (PDF) for free.
newsletter.privacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time. Spam protection included.
newsletter.success_message: We have received your registration. Your AI Intelligence Report will be sent shortly. Please also check your spam folder.
newsletter.success_message_extended: We have just sent you the confirmation link and your AI Intelligence Report. Please check your inbox.
newsletter.error: Sorry! Something went wrong. Please try again later.

about.meta_description: Learn more about the mission and editorial team of SwissTech Briefing.
about.title: Editorial Mission & Focus
about.mission: SwissTech Briefing is the leading digital magazine at the intersection of technology, business, and security in Switzerland. Our mission is to precisely categorize complex technological developments and demonstrate their relevance to Switzerland as a business location.

ki.title: Artificial Intelligence
ki.desc: Focus on ETH/EPFL research and Swiss AI compliance.

defense.title: Defense Tech
defense.desc: Cybersecurity and technological innovations of the armed forces.

startups.title: Startups
startups.desc: Deep-tech investment trends and unicorn growth.

regulation.title: Regulation
regulation.desc: FINMA guidelines and the impact of global laws (EU AI Act).

about.transparency_text: We believe in independent, fact-based journalism. All our analyses are written by specialist editors. For guest contributions from experts, we always disclose their backgrounds and possible conflicts of interest. We use AI tools exclusively to support research and formatting, never for the unchecked generation of content.
about.editorial_text: Our team consists of experienced technology journalists and subject matter experts located in Zurich and Lausanne. We work closely with experts from science and industry to guarantee the highest professional quality.

contact.meta_description: Contact the SwissTech Briefing editorial team for press inquiries or feedback.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Do you have feedback, a news tip, or press inquiries? We look forward to hearing from you.
contact.editorial_desc: For general inquiries and news tips:
contact.cta_desc: Subscribe to our newsletter so you don't miss any important updates.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.description: Choose which cookies you want to allow.
cookies.banner_desc: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible user experience. Necessary cookies are required for the operation of the website. We only set analysis and marketing cookies with your express consent.
cookies.banner_note: You can change your selection at any time via "Cookie Settings" in the footer.
